We had board games. These are games where players usually move pieces around a flat board like
chess. We had quiz which is a game where you answer questions.
Cheat means to be dishonest when playing a game
and you can also call a person a cheat if they are dishonest in a game.
We had Goody which is someone who likes following rules like me.
